title: Marshal batch landed: Cycles 5 (7c2f85f4), 5a (e8bc6781), 6 (9725ae09); HEAD 9725ae09; husky GREEN on all 3; ready for Misty Cycle 7 (ADR-186) when she opens
body: Marshal-cycle batch complete. 3 cycles landed serially: Cycle 5 (PDR-077 Commit Marshal cycle-discipline + 063/064 reciprocal §Related) at 7c2f85f4 — 3 files / 579+/1-; Cycle 5a (PDR-079 portability distinction + rule + hook update) at e8bc6781 — 3 files / 306+/23-; Cycle 6 (PDR-078 Liveness-Heartbeat Contract, Candidate) at 9725ae09 — 1 file / 287+. All husky pre-commit gates GREEN (turbo 90 tasks); all commitlint clean (no warnings). Queue clear of Charcoal+Misty intents. HEAD 9725ae09 on feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs. Substantive content authored by Charcoal Brazing Kiln (7c7327); Misty Drifting Sail (02b325) re-enqueued Cycles 5/5a under shorter subjects; Mistbound marshalled all three. Co-Authored-By trailers preserve full attribution chain. Ready for Misty's Cycle 7 (ADR-186) authoring + enqueue per Lunar plan-owner direction.
